                                    <div class="shortcut-description">Copy file content</div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    `;
                    elements.wrapToggle.style.display = 'none';
                } else {
                    elements.contentViewerEl.innerHTML = `<p>Select a file to preview.</p>`;
                }

                // Prepare items for virtual scroller
                const items = [];
                
                // Add ".." if not in root
                if (pathArray.length > 0) {
                    items.push({
                        type: 'folder',
                        name: '..',
                        isBack: true
                    });
                }

                // Sort items
                node.children.sort((a, b) => {
                    if (a.type !== b.type) {
                        return a.type === 'folder' ? -1 : 1;
                    }
                    return a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
                });

                node.children.forEach(item => {
                    items.push(item);
                });

                virtualScroller.setItems(items);
            }

            // Add copy button to code blocks
            function addCopyButton(wrapperElement, content) {
                const button = document.createElement('button');
                button.className = 'copy-button';
                button.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copy';
                button.onclick = async () => {
                    try {
                        await navigator.clipboard.writeText(content);
                        button.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-check"></i> Copied!';
                        button.classList.add('copied');
                        showToast('Code copied to clipboard');
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            button.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copy';
                            button.classList.remove('copied');
                        }, 2000);
                    } catch (err) {
                        showToast('Failed to copy code', 'error');
                    }
                };
                wrapperElement.appendChild(button);
            }

            // Add line numbers with syntax highlighting
            function addLineNumbers(content, lang) {
                const lines = content.split('\n');
                const wrapper = document.createElement('div');
                wrapper.className = 'line-numbers-wrapper';
                
                const lineNumbers = document.createElement('div');
                lineNumbers.className = 'line-numbers';
                lineNumbers.innerHTML = lines.map((_, i) => i + 1).join('<br>');
                
                // Create code element with syntax highlighting
                const codeElement = document.createElement('code');
                codeElement.className = `language-${lang}`;
                codeElement.textContent = content;
                
                // Apply syntax highlighting
                if (Prism.languages[lang]) {
                    codeElement.innerHTML = Prism.highlight(content, Prism.languages[lang], lang);
                }
                
                // Create pre element
                const preElement = document.createElement('pre');
                preElement.appendChild(codeElement);
                
                // Create code content div
                const codeContent = document.createElement('div');
                codeContent.className = 'code-content';
                codeContent.appendChild(preElement);
                
                wrapper.appendChild(lineNumbers);
                wrapper.appendChild(codeContent);
                
                return wrapper;
            }

            // Toggle word wrap
            function toggleWordWrap() {
                state.wordWrap = !state.wordWrap;
                const codeContent = elements.contentViewerEl.querySelector('.code-content code');
                if (codeContent) {
                    if (state.wordWrap) {
                        codeContent.style.whiteSpace = 'pre-wrap';
                        codeContent.style.wordBreak = 'break-word';
                        elements.wrapToggle.classList.add('active');
                    } else {
                        codeContent.style.whiteSpace = 'pre';
                        codeContent.style.wordBreak = 'normal';
                        elements.wrapToggle.classList.remove('active');
                    }
                }
            }

            async function renderFile(filePath, fileName, fileSize) {
                const icon = getFileIcon(fileName);
                const size = fileSize ? formatFileSize(fileSize) : 'Unknown size';
                
                elements.contentViewerEl.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="file-header">
                        <div class="file-title">
                            <span class="icon">${icon}</span>
                            <span>${fileName}</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="file-meta">
                            <span><i class="fas fa-chart-bar"></i> ${size}</span>
                            <span><i class="fas fa-folder"></i> ${filePath}</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="file-actions">
                            <button id="back-btn" onclick="renderDirectory([])">
                                <i class="fas fa-arrow-left"></i> Back
                            </button>
                            <button id="raw-btn" onclick="viewRaw('${filePath}')">
                                <i class="fas fa-file"></i> Raw
                            </button>
                            <button id="download-btn" onclick="downloadFile('${filePath}', '${fileName}')">
                                <i class="fas fa-download"></i> Download
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="loading">
                        <div class="skeleton skeleton-title"></div>
                        <div class="skeleton skeleton-text"></div>
                        <div class="skeleton skeleton-text"></div>
                        <div class="skeleton skeleton-text" style="width: 80%;"></div>
                    </div>
                `;
                
                elements.wrapToggle.style.display = 'flex';
                
                try {
                    const response = await fetch(`./${filePath}`);
                    if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`Could not fetch ${filePath}`);
                    const content = await response.text();
                    state.currentFileContent = content;
                    const fileExtension = fileName.split('.').pop().toLowerCase();

                    let contentElement = null;
                    if (fileExtension === 'md') {
                        contentElement = document.createElement('div');
                        contentElement.className = 'markdown-content';
                        contentElement.innerHTML = marked.parse(content);
                    } else if (['png', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'gif', 'svg', 'webp', 'bmp', 'ico'].includes(fileExtension)) {
                        contentElement = document.createElement('img');
                        contentElement.src = `./${filePath}`;
                        contentElement.alt = fileName;
                    } else if (['mp4', 'webm', 'ogg', 'avi', 'mov', 'wmv', 'mkv', 'flv'].includes(fileExtension)) {
                        contentElement = document.createElement('video');
                        contentElement.src = `./${filePath}`;
                        contentElement.controls = true;
                        contentElement.style.maxWidth = '100%';
                        contentElement.style.height = 'auto';
                    } else if (['mp3', 'wav', 'flac', 'aac', 'ogg', 'm4a'].includes(fileExtension)) {
                        contentElement = document.createElement('audio');
                        contentElement.src = `./${filePath}`;
                        contentElement.controls = true;
                        contentElement.style.width = '100%';
                        contentElement.style.outline = 'none';
                    } else if (['pdf'].includes(fileExtension)) {
                        contentElement = document.createElement('embed');
                        contentElement.src = `./${filePath}`;
                        contentElement.type = 'application/pdf';
                        contentElement.width = '100%';
                        contentElement.height = '600px';
                    } else {
                        // Create code block with line numbers and syntax highlighting
                        const lang = Prism.languages[fileExtension] ? fileExtension : 'plaintext';
                        const wrapper = addLineNumbers(content, lang);
                        addCopyButton(wrapper, content);
                        contentElement = wrapper;
                        
                        // Apply current word wrap state
                        if (state.wordWrap) {
                            const codeElement = wrapper.querySelector('code');
                            if (codeElement) {
                                codeElement.style.whiteSpace = 'pre-wrap';
                                codeElement.style.wordBreak = 'break-word';
                                elements.wrapToggle.classList.add('active');
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    
                    const headerEl = elements.contentViewerEl.querySelector('.file-header');
                    elements.contentViewerEl.innerHTML = '';
                    if (headerEl) elements.contentViewerEl.appendChild(headerEl);
                    if (contentElement) elements.contentViewerEl.appendChild(contentElement);
                    
                } catch (error) {
                    elements.contentViewerEl.innerHTML = `
                        <div class="file-header">
                            <div class="file-title">
                                <span class="icon">${icon}</span>
                                <span>${fileName}</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="file-meta">
                                <span><i class="fas fa-chart-bar"></i> ${size}</span>
                                <span><i class="fas fa-folder"></i> ${filePath}</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="file-actions">
                                <button id="back-btn" onclick="renderDirectory([])">
                                    <i class="fas fa-arrow-left"></i> Back
                                </button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <p style="color: var(--error-color);">Error loading file: ${error.message}</p>
                    `;
                    showToast(`Error loading file: ${error.message}`, 'error');
                    console.error(error);
                }
            }

            // View raw file
            function viewRaw(filePath) {
                window.open(`./${filePath}`, '_blank');
            }

            // Download file
            async function downloadFile(filePath, fileName) {
                try {
                    const response = await fetch(`./${filePath}`);
                    if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`Could not fetch ${filePath}`);
                    
                    const blob = await response.blob();
                    const url = window.URL.createObjectURL(blob);
                    const a = document.createElement('a');
                    a.href = url;
                    a.download = fileName;
                    document.body.appendChild(a);
                    a.click();
                    window.URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
                    document.body.removeChild(a);
                    showToast(`Downloaded ${fileName}`);
                } catch (error) {
                    console.error('Download failed:', error);
                    showToast(`Failed to download ${fileName}: ${error.message}`, 'error');
                }
            }

            // Event listeners
            elements.sidebarToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {
                elements.sidebar.classList.toggle('collapsed');
            });

            elements.wrapToggle.addEventListener('click', toggleWordWrap);

            elements.themeToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {
                const themeKeys = Object.keys(themes);
                const currentIndex = themeKeys.indexOf(state.currentTheme);
                const nextIndex = (currentIndex + 1) % themeKeys.length;
                switchTheme(themeKeys[nextIndex]);
            });

            // Search with debouncing
            let searchTimeout;
            elements.searchBox.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
                clearTimeout(searchTimeout);
                searchTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                    searchFiles(e.target.value);
                }, 150);
            });
            
            // Advanced help modal functions (opened by keybind '?')
            function showAdvancedHelp() {
                // Toggle behaviour: if already open, close
                const overlay = elements.advHelpModal;
                if (!overlay) return;
                if (overlay.style.display === 'flex') {
                    hideAdvancedHelp();
                    return;
                }
                
                // Open modal and note the open time to avoid immediately reacting to the same key event
                overlay.style.display = 'flex';
                overlay.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
                state.advHelpOpenTime = performance.now();
                
                // add handlers that will close the modal on next pointer or key input
                advHelpHandlers.pointer = (e) => {
                    hideAdvancedHelp();
                };
                advHelpHandlers.key = (e) => {
                    // ignore the event that opened the modal (very recent events)
                    const now = performance.now();
                    if (now - state.advHelpOpenTime < 50) return;
                    hideAdvancedHelp();
                };
                document.addEventListener('pointerdown', advHelpHandlers.pointer, true);
                document.addEventListener('keydown', advHelpHandlers.key, true);
            }

            function hideAdvancedHelp() {
                const overlay = elements.advHelpModal;
                if (!overlay) return;
                overlay.style.display = 'none';
                overlay.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
                // remove any attached handlers
                if (advHelpHandlers.pointer) {
                    document.removeEventListener('pointerdown', advHelpHandlers.pointer, true);
                    advHelpHandlers.pointer = null;
                }
                if (advHelpHandlers.key) {
                    document.removeEventListener('keydown', advHelpHandlers.key, true);
                    advHelpHandlers.key = null;
                }
             }

            // Clear search on Escape
            elements.searchBox.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
                 // keep Escape behaviour when typing
                 if (e.key === 'Escape') {
                     elements.searchBox.value = '';
                     elements.searchBox.blur();
                     renderDirectory(state.currentPath);
                 }
             });
              
              // Keyboard navigation
              document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
                 const items = virtualScroller.items;
                 const activeIsSearch = document.activeElement === elements.searchBox;
 
                 // If search box is focused, allow arrow navigation and Enter to select results
                 if (activeIsSearch) {
                    // allow opening advanced help even when search is focused (key 'h', case-insensitive)
                    if (e.key && e.key.toLowerCase() === 'h') {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        showAdvancedHelp();
                        return;
                    }
                     if (!items || items.length === 0) return;
                     if (['ArrowUp','ArrowDown','Enter'].includes(e.key)) {
                         e.preventDefault();
                         if (e.key === 'ArrowUp') {
                             state.selectedIndex = Math.max(0, state.selectedIndex - 1);
                             updateSelection();
                             return;
                         }
                         if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') {
                             state.selectedIndex = Math.min(items.length - 1, state.selectedIndex + 1);
                             updateSelection();
                             return;
                         }
                         if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                             const selectedItem = items[state.selectedIndex];
                             if (selectedItem) {
                                 if (selectedItem.isBack) {
                                     renderDirectory(state.currentPath.slice(0, -1));
                                 } else if (selectedItem.type === 'folder') {
                                     renderDirectory([...state.currentPath, selectedItem.name]);
                                 } else {
                                     renderFile(selectedItem.path, selectedItem.name, selectedItem.size);
                                 }
                             }
                         return;
                         }
                     }
                     // Escape key handled elsewhere (searchBox keydown) — let typing work for other keys
                     return;
                 }
 
                 // Not focused in search box: keep existing behavior
                 if (e.target.tagName === 'INPUT' || e.target.tagName === 'TEXTAREA') {
                     if (e.key === 'Escape') {
                         e.target.blur();
                     }
                     return;
                 }
 
                 if (!items || items.length === 0) return;
                 // top-level toggle key for advanced help (h/H)
                 if (e.key && e.key.toLowerCase() === 'h') {
                     e.preventDefault();
                     showAdvancedHelp();
                     return;
                 }
                 switch(e.key) {
                      case 'ArrowUp':
                          e.preventDefault();
                          state.selectedIndex = Math.max(0, state.selectedIndex - 1);
                          updateSelection();
                          break;
                     case 'ArrowDown':
                         e.preventDefault();
                         state.selectedIndex = Math.min(items.length - 1, state.selectedIndex + 1);
                         updateSelection();
                         break;
                     case 'ArrowLeft':
                         e.preventDefault();
                         if (state.currentPath.length > 0) {
                             renderDirectory(state.currentPath.slice(0, -1));
                         } else {
                             renderDirectory([]);
                         }
                         break;
                     case 'ArrowRight':
                     case 'Enter':
                         e.preventDefault();
                         if (state.selectedIndex >= 0 && items[state.selectedIndex]) {
                             const selectedItem = items[state.selectedIndex];
                             if (selectedItem.isBack) {
                                 renderDirectory(state.currentPath.slice(0, -1));
                             } else if (selectedItem.type === 'folder') {
                                 renderDirectory([...state.currentPath, selectedItem.name]);
                             } else {
                                 renderFile(selectedItem.path, selectedItem.name, selectedItem.size);
                             }
                         }
                         break;
                     case '/':
                         e.preventDefault();
                         elements.searchBox.focus();
                         break;
                     case 'Escape':
                         e.preventDefault();
                         if (elements.searchBox.value) {
                             elements.searchBox.value = '';
                             renderDirectory(state.currentPath);
                         } else {
                             renderDirectory([]);
                         }
                         break;
                     case 'b':
                     case 'B':
                         e.preventDefault();
                         elements.sidebar.classList.toggle('collapsed');
                         break;
                     case 't':
                     case 'T':
                         e.preventDefault();
                         const themeKeys = Object.keys(themes);
                         const currentIndex = themeKeys.indexOf(state.currentTheme);
                         const nextIndex = (currentIndex + 1) % themeKeys.length;
                         switchTheme(themeKeys[nextIndex]);
                         break;
                     case 'c':
                     case 'C':
                         if (e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) {
                             e.preventDefault();
                             const codeContent = elements.contentViewerEl.querySelector('.code-content code');
                             if (codeContent) {
                                 navigator.clipboard.writeText(codeContent.textContent);
                                 showToast('File content copied to clipboard');
                             }
                         }
                         break;
                 }
              });
            
            // Go back one folder
            function goBackOneFolder() {
                if (state.currentPath.length > 0) {
                    renderDirectory(state.currentPath.slice(0, -1));
                }
            }

            // Make functions globally accessible
            window.renderDirectory = renderDirectory;
            window.viewRaw = viewRaw;
            window.downloadFile = downloadFile;
            window.goBackOneFolder = goBackOneFolder;

            // Initialize everything
            initializeVirtualScroller();
            initializeTouchGestures();
            switchTheme(state.currentTheme);
            loadFileTree();
        });
    </script>
</body>
</html>
